zh.lifeSummary: 當Adelle Furnes於大約1060年出生時，她的父親Erard de Furnes22歲，母親Adelle Selvesla22歲。她和Eustache De Fiennes ( Admiral )至少有1個兒子。她去世於大約1127年在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯享年69歲，埋葬在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯範恩斯。

nameMeanings.name: Furnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Burns
meanings: Scottish (central Scotland and northern England): habitational name from any of various places called formerly Burnis, Burnes, or Burnhouse (named with burn- ‘stream’), especially those in Kincardineshire, Renfrewshire, Dunbartonshire, and possibly Argyll.
English and Scottish: variant either of Burn , with post-medieval excrescent -s, or of Barnes .
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Broin (see Byrne ), with excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Adelle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From French Adèle , an ancient name popular in medieval Europe because of the fame of a 7th-century saint, a daughter of the Frankish king Dagobert II. It is of Germanic origin, from adal ‘noble’ (a short form of a two-element name such as Adelheid; see Adelaide ). It was the name of William the Conqueror's youngest daughter ( c.1062–1137 ), who became the wife of Stephen of Blois. However, it died out in England in the later Middle Ages. It was revived in the 19th century, being the name of a character in Johann Strauss's opera Die Fledermaus. Its popularity was further reinforced in the 1930s as the name of a character in the novels of Dornford Yates .

variants.name: Adel
meanings: From French Adèle , an ancient name popular in medieval Europe because of the fame of a 7th-century saint, a daughter of the Frankish king Dagobert II. It is of Germanic origin, from adal ‘noble’ (a short form of a two-element name such as Adelheid; see Adelaide ). It was the name of William the Conqueror's youngest daughter ( c.1062–1137 ), who became the wife of Stephen of Blois. However, it died out in England in the later Middle Ages. It was revived in the 19th century, being the name of a character in Johann Strauss's opera Die Fledermaus. Its popularity was further reinforced in the 1930s as the name of a character in the novels of Dornford Yates .

en.lifeSummary: When Adelle Furnes was born about 1060, her father, Erard de Furnes, was 22 and her mother, Adelle Selvesla, was 22. She had at least 1 son with Eustache De Fiennes ( Admiral ). She died about 1127, in Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 69, and was buried in Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adelle Furnes est née environ 1060, son père, Erard de Furnes, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Adelle Selvesla, avait 22 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Eustache De Fiennes ( Admiral ). Elle est décédée environ 1127, à Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adelle Furnes um 1060 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Erard de Furnes 22 und ihre Mutter Adelle Selvesla 22. Sie hatte mit Eustache De Fiennes ( Admiral ) mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb um 1127 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich und wurde in Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adelle Furnes è nata il circa 1060, sua padre, Erard de Furnes, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Adelle Selvesla, aveva 22 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Eustache De Fiennes ( Admiral ). Morì circa 1127, nel Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolta a Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Adelle Furnesが約1060年に生まれた時，父Erard de Furnesは22歳，母Adelle Selveslaは22歳であった。彼女はEustache De Fiennes ( Admiral )との間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は約1127年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスカレイスで69歳で死去し，フランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスフィーンスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adelle Furnes(이)가 대략 1060년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Erard de Furnes(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelle Selvesla(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 Eustache De Fiennes ( Admiral )(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1127년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 캘레이에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 피네스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adelle Furnes nasceu aproximadamente 1060, seu pai, Erard de Furnes, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Adelle Selvesla, tinha 22 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Eustache De Fiennes ( Admiral ). Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1127, em Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 69 anos, e foi sepultada em Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adelle Furnes родилась около 1060 г., её отцу по имени Erard de Furnes было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Adelle Selvesla, 22. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Eustache De Fiennes ( Admiral ). Она умерла около 1127 г. в местности калеи, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности фиеннесь, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция.
